mapper.select:
SELECT id, parent_id as parentId, name, sort_order as sortOrder, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM `category`
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, parent_id as parentId, name, sort_order as sortOrder, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM `category` WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `category` (parent_id, name, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())
